view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Service with product add-on' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking of a service that includes a product.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Service with product add-on' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful booking of a service that includes a product.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the service offered (Luxury Hair Package) includes a product add-on (shampoo/conditioner). The evidence from the prior steps shows that customers can book the service, which includes the product, thus fulfilling the requirement. Specifically, the booking details confirm that the service and product are bundled together, which directly supports the requirement of 'Service with product add-on'.
